signIn.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: Connect with:
signUp.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
signUp.passwordRequired: Password must be at least 8 characters
signUp.termsPrefix: By creating an account you agree to the
signUp.termsSuffix: We'll occasionally send you emails about news, products, and services; you can opt-out anytime.

disabled.title: App is Under Construction

passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link.
passwordReset.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
passwordReset.emailSentDescription: We've sent a password reset link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to reset your password.
passwordReset.sidePanelDescription: Intelligent and fast solution connecting talents with opportunities.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.passwordRequired: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.sidePanelDescription: Intelligent and fast solution connecting talents with opportunities.

emailVerification.title: Verify your email
emailVerification.subtitle: We've sent a verification email to your email address.
